welcome_back:
👋 Welcome back, {name}!
💰 {balance} USDT ≈ {balanceRub} ₽
👇 Please select a section:
shop_title:
🛒 Available products:

💡 Select a product for details
shop_empty: 😔 No products yet. Check back later!
product_no_stock: ❌ Sorry, this product is out of stock.
product_buy_confirm: 🛒 Purchase Confirmation 📦 Product: {name} 💰 Price: {price} USDT (~{priceRub} ₽) 💳 Your balance: {balance} USDT 📉 Balance after: {newBalance} USDT ⚡ Are you sure you want to buy?
product_not_enough:
❌ Insufficient funds!

💰 Product price: {price} USDT
💳 Your balance: {balance} USDT
❗ Missing: {diff} USDT

Top up balance?
order_created: ✅ Order created! 📋 Order ID: {orderId} 🔄 Status: Pending ⏳ Our operator will contact you shortly.
order_awaiting_token: 📋 Order {orderId} created! 🔑 To activate your ChatGPT subscription, we need your token. How to get token: 1. Log in at chatgpt.com 2. Go to: https://chatgpt.com/api/auth/session 3. Copy all text from the page and send it here ⚠️ The token is valid for a few minutes, send it quickly!
token_received: ✅ Token received! Awaiting operator confirmation. 📋 Order: {orderId}
order_completed: 🎉 Your order is completed! 📦 Product: {name} 📋 Order: {orderId} ✅ {result}
order_cancelled: ❌ Order cancelled 📋 Order: {orderId} 💬 Reason: {reason} 💰 Funds returned to balance: {price} USDT
order_failed: ❌ Activation error! 📋 Order: {orderId} 💬 {error} 💰 Funds returned. Please contact support.
topup_enter_amount: 💳 Enter top-up amount in USDT 📌 Minimum: {min} USDT Example: 5
topup_invalid_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. Enter a number greater than {min}.
topup_instructions: 💳 Balance Top-up 💰 Amount: {amount} USDT (~{amountRub} ₽) 📤 Send coins to the address: {wallet} 🌐 Network: {network} 📸 After sending, please provide a screenshot or transaction hash for confirmation.
topup_proof_received:
✅ Top-up request received!

💰 Amount: {amount} USDT
📋 Awaiting operator confirmation.
topup_confirmed:
✅ Balance topped up!

💰 Credited: +{amount} USDT (~{amountRub} ₽)
💳 Current balance: {balance} USDT
referral_info: ⭐ Referral Program 🔗 Your link: {link} 🎁 For each invited friend you will get {bonus} USDT (~{bonusRub} ₽) 👥 Invited: {count} people 💰 Earned: {earned} USDT
support_text: 🆘 Support If you have any questions or problems, write to us. 👤 An operator will respond shortly.
about_text:
🏪 About Store
We sell licensed digital keys and subscriptions at the best prices. ✅ Instant delivery ✅ Quality guarantee ✅ 24/7 support
banned: 🚫 You are banned in this bot.
error: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.
orders_empty_active:
✅ No active orders
All your orders are processed. 🎉 Want to make another purchase?
orders_empty_all:
📭 No orders yet
The shop has ChatGPT activations and other products — take a look! 💡 The first order often comes with a discount or bonus.
token_check_intro: Send the contents of the /api/auth/session page from your ChatGPT account. We'll verify the token structure and expiration without charging money. This answers the question: "can I successfully activate a subscription with this token?".
token_check_how_to: 📖 How to get the token: 1️⃣ Log in at chatgpt.com 2️⃣ Open chatgpt.com/api/auth/session 3️⃣ Copy the full text of the page and send it here
token_check_ready: 🎯 Token is ready for activation. You can place the order — we'll use exactly this token.
tos_intro: Before you start, please review our documents and confirm your consent:
tos_declined:
❌ Without accepting the documents, the bot cannot be used.

You can return and accept at any time — send /start.
tos_required: ⚠️ To use the bot, you must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service. Send /start.
tos_accepted_alert: ✅ Thanks! You can now use the bot.
documents_text: Here are the current documents that govern the use of the shop:
seller_access_denied_text:
You are not registered as a seller.
If you want to become a seller, please contact the administrator.
seller_banned: ❌ Your seller account is blocked. Contact the administrator.
seller_cabinet_title:
🏪 Seller Cabinet
👤 @{username} 💰 Balance: {balance} USDT 📈 Total earned: {earned} USDT 📦 Active orders: {activeOrders} {walletLine}
Commands: /seller — cabinet
seller_order_not_found: ❌ Order not found or already closed
seller_order_deliver_title: 📦 Order fulfillment Product: {name} Please send the account credentials (login:password, link, or any text). You can also send a file or photo. These details will be forwarded to the buyer, after which the order will be closed and you will receive your payment.
seller_buyer_order_completed: ✅ Your order {name} was fulfilled by the seller!
seller_deliver_need_file: ❌ Please send text, photo, or document.
seller_order_completed_success: ✅ Order successfully fulfilled! 📦 Product: {name} 💰 Income: +{payout} USDT Your current balance: {balance} USDT The details have been successfully sent to the buyer.
seller_wallet_setup_title: 💳 Wallet Setup{current} Enter your USDT address (any network — TRC-20, BEP-20, APTOS, etc.):
seller_wallet_invalid_address: ❌ Invalid address. Enter your USDT address:
seller_wallet_address_accepted: 📬 Address accepted! Now enter the network name: Examples: TRC-20, BEP-20, APTOS, SOL, ERC-20
seller_withdraw_pending_error: ⏳ You already have a pending request
seller_withdraw_title: 💸 Withdraw funds 💰 Available: {balance} USDT 💳 Wallet: {wallet} 🌐 Network: {network} Enter amount to withdraw (min. {min} USDT):
seller_withdraw_confirm_title:
💸 Withdrawal Confirmation
💰 Amount: {amount} USDT 💳 Wallet: {wallet} 🌐 Network: {network}
Confirm the withdrawal request.
seller_withdraw_created: ✅ Withdrawal request created! 💰 Amount: {amount} USDT 💳 Wallet: {wallet} 🌐 Network: {network} ⏳ An administrator will process your request shortly.
buyer_confirmation_title: ✅ The seller has delivered the data for order {name}!
seller_order_awaiting_confirmation_succe: ✅ Data sent to buyer! 📦 Product: {name} ⏳ Awaiting buyer confirmation (up to {hours} h.). Once the buyer verifies the data (or time expires), you will receive +{payout} USDT to your balance.
buyer_dispute_opened: ❌ Dispute opened! An administrator will assist in resolving the issue shortly.
buyer_order_confirmed: ✅ Order confirmed! Thank you for your purchase.
support_hello: 👨‍💻 Support is online! Our operator is ready to help you. Write your question — we will answer right here.
seller_new_order_title:
📦 New order! {icon} {productName} 📋 Order: {orderId} 👤 Buyer: {buyerTag} 💰 Your income: +{payout} USDT
Fulfill the order and click the button below.
